assumptions: The issue concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements for foreign currency exposure arising from an intragroup dividend recognised as a receivable.
Only IFRS accounting approaches explicitly evidenced in the provided context are included.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context explicitly refers to fair value hedge accounting in IFRS 9 and IAS 39 cross-references as a distinct hedge accounting model.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context explicitly refers to cash flow hedges as a separate hedge accounting model with distinct presentation consequences.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IFRIC 16 guidance specifically on hedges of foreign currency risk arising from a net investment in a foreign operation in consolidated financial statements.
